test.command: cd backend && cargo test; cd frontend && bun test

typecheck.command: cd backend && cargo check; cd frontend && npm run check

blockingIssues.description: read_cache::evict_channel does not evict workspace bootstrap entries keyed with selected_channel_id=null, even though bootstrap resolution can map null to the mutated channel via first-channel fallback, leaving stale bootstrap payloads until TTL expiry.

cache_headers middleware adds Cache-Control for GET routes without response-status gating, allowing transient error responses (e.g., 404/401/429) to be cached and potentially serving stale negative states after data becomes available.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md backend data-layer notes to reflect current bounded-parallel S3 loading, targeted cache eviction, summary-skip video fetch behavior, channel snapshot deduplication, and workspace bootstrap key/selection invalidation nuance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine strict RED-step wording to explicitly allow service-dependent/backend integration paths where deterministic failing-first tests are impractical, while still requiring clear test intent and evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This mismatch was independently observed in reviews for backend-parallel-s3-ops, backend-granular-cache, and backend-cache-headers.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture notes are stale for backend cache behavior after this feature.
